title: Induction of Dopaminergic Neuronal Progenitors From iPSCs Using Microfabricated Disk
author: Chen, Xiuqing
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This protocol describes how to generate dopaminergic neural progenitor cells (DPCs) from induced-pluripotent stem cells (iPSCs) using microfabricated embryoid body disk device (EB disk). 

 This protocol describes how to: 

 
	 Thaw and culture dopaminergic neural progenitor cells (DPCs). 
	 Plate DPCs in a 96 well format to be differentiated into dopaminergic neurons (DNs)
steps_raw:
